hero.headline: Your Health, Our Priority
hero.subhead: Apollo Information Centre Aranghata brings world-class healthcare closer to you. Book consultations, diagnostics, and specialist referrals — all in one place.

trust.title: Why Choose Apollo Aranghata?
trust.subtitle: Bringing the trust of Apollo Hospitals to your neighbourhood with accessible, affordable, and quality healthcare services.
trust.apolloBrandDesc: Part of India's largest and most trusted healthcare network
trust.localPresenceDesc: Serving Aranghata, Ranaghat & Nadia district communities
trust.expertDoctorsDesc: Experienced physicians and specialists available for consultation
trust.qualityCareDesc: Standardized Apollo protocols for diagnosis and treatment

services.title: Our Services
services.headline: Healthcare Services at Your Doorstep
services.subtitle: From routine checkups to specialist referrals — we cover all your healthcare needs right here in Aranghata.
services.opdDesc: General physician consultations for fever, diabetes, blood pressure, thyroid, and other common ailments. Walk-in and appointment-based.
services.diagDesc: Comprehensive pathology and radiology services including blood tests, urine tests, ECG, X-Ray, and ultrasound with accurate reports.
services.referralDesc: Direct referral and appointment booking for Apollo Hospitals Chennai. We handle your case papers, prior reports, and scheduling.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three easy steps to get quality healthcare — no long queues, no confusion.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Reach us via WhatsApp or phone. Tell us your symptoms or the service you need.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our staff checks doctor availability and confirms your appointment with date & time.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Visit the centre at your slot. Pay via cash, UPI, or Razorpay link. Get treated.

doctorSchedule.title: Weekly Doctor Schedule
doctorSchedule.subtitle: Plan your visit. Book in advance to avoid waiting.

appointment.title: Book Your Appointment
appointment.subtitle: Fill the form and we will confirm your slot within 30 minutes via WhatsApp or call. Payment can be completed at the clinic after confirmation.
appointment.preferCallDesc: Call us directly at {{phone}} for instant booking.
appointment.whatsappUpdatesDesc: You will receive confirmation and your digital bill securely on WhatsApp.
appointment.payAtClinicDesc: Pay at clinic subject to confirmation
appointment.consent: By submitting, you agree to receive appointment details via WhatsApp.
appointment.submittedDesc: We have received your request. Our team will review and confirm your appointment via WhatsApp shortly.
appointment.loadingError: Failed to load payment gateway. Please try again or choose Pay at Clinic.
appointment.bookingError: Failed to book appointment. Please try again.

location.title: Visit Our Centre
location.subtitle: Conveniently located in Aranghata, easily accessible from Ranaghat and nearby areas.

footer.description: Bringing Apollo's trusted healthcare network to your community. Book appointments, diagnostics, and specialist referrals with ease.
